calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2007 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John P. Aubrey of the Office of the City Attorney, 554-3968, appearing for defendant and moving party
Janet Stanford, 648-1579, plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona

The Court made a personal disclosure and, no objections having been raised, the matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MATTHEW ROTHSCHILD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
